steps.t: The guard's report suggested that the caravan was ambushed by the Haradrim while travelling the south road. Search along the road for signs of the amb…
You have discovered the caravan. It was clearly ambushed, the cargo stolen, and all occupants are missing. You should set about finding the manifest.
The manifest lists the items aboard as eight crates of food, an ornate cruet meant as a gift, a sealed document case, and twelve ornate weapons. Perha…
